input: I just received an email: 'Hi Will, congrats on moving to Round 2 of interviews at Spotify. We elected for the take home in Round 2.'
summary: Round 2 interview take-home project from Spotify.
expected_behavior: The agent should acknowledge the progress, suggest reviewing the Interview Prep Hub, and propose a write to update the Job Hunt War Room with the new interview status.

input: Job Description: We are looking for a backend engineer with 5 years of experience in Java, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL. Familiarity with Kubernetes is a plus.
summary: Backend engineer job description requiring Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes.
expected_behavior: The agent should compare these requirements against My Skills.md. It should note that the user has Java and SQL experience, but identify Spring Boot and Kubernetes as potential gaps. It should NOT propose a write immediately unless asked.

input: I finished reading the 3Blue1Brown Linear Algebra series.
summary: User completed a learning resource on Linear Algebra.
expected_behavior: The agent should propose a write to update Current Learning.md to remove/mark complete the 3Blue1Brown series, and suggest adding the newly acquired knowledge to My Skills.md.

input: I just got a rejection email from Google for the SWE role.
summary: Rejection email received from Google for SWE role.
expected_behavior: The agent should acknowledge the rejection and propose a write to update the Job Hunt War Room.md to change the status to 'Rejected', and possibly suggest doing an interview retrospective.

input: I have an upcoming interview with Anthropic for an AI engineering role, what should I brush up on?
summary: Request for interview prep material for Anthropic.
expected_behavior: The agent should query the vault for AI/LLM related notes or check Employer Skill Requirements.md for Anthropic, and generate a study plan. It should NOT propose a write.

input: A recruiter from Meta just reached out to me on LinkedIn about an AI Platform role.
summary: Recruiter outreach from Meta regarding an AI Platform role.
expected_behavior: The agent should propose a write to update the Job Hunt War Room.md or networking tracker with the new lead, and suggest checking existing connections at Meta.

input: I want to add my recent project 'Nexus Agentic Engine' to my resume.
summary: Request to update resume with new project.
expected_behavior: The agent should propose a write to update the professional portfolio/resume notes with details of the Nexus Agentic Engine project.

input: I got an initial offer from OpenAI for 250k base, how should I negotiate?
summary: Request for negotiation advice for an OpenAI offer.
expected_behavior: The agent should consult the Compensation & Negotiation notes or Protocol - Career Maintenance.md, and provide a strategic plan for counter-offering. It should NOT propose a write immediately.
